creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to andy from comment #0)
> ...
> /usr/bin/ld.bfd: BFD 2.17.50 [FreeBSD] 2007-07-03 internal error
This looks fishy.  Per what I read in UPDATING, it had been removed on 20181126.  Have you been tracking FreeBSD via source upgrades for some time and forgot to ``make delete-old'' at one point?
